properties.name: Babylon
properties.summary: Major Mesopotamian city in present-day Iraq.
properties.quest: Track how a city becomes a symbol in later cultures.

properties.name: Ziggurat of Ur
properties.summary: Monumental ziggurat associated with the city of Ur.
properties.quest: Compare stepped sacred architecture with pyramids.

properties.name: Nineveh
properties.summary: Major Assyrian capital near modern Mosul.
properties.quest: Ask how walls, palaces and libraries express state power.

properties.name: Persepolis
properties.summary: Ceremonial capital of the Achaemenid Empire.
properties.quest: Read empire through stairways, reliefs and tribute scenes.

properties.name: Pasargadae
properties.summary: Early Achaemenid capital associated with Cyrus the Great.
properties.quest: Compare founding capitals with later imperial display.

properties.name: Hattusa
properties.summary: Capital of the Hittite empire in central Anatolia.
properties.quest: Study fortifications, archives and imperial diplomacy.

properties.name: Petra
properties.summary: Rock-cut city and caravan hub in Jordan.
properties.quest: Study water engineering and trade geography.
